name: Agent Checkpoint
description: Automatic checkpoint and rollback for long-running agent tasks.

enabled.label: Enable Checkpoints
enabled.help: Enable or disable automatic checkpoint creation.

storagePath.label: Storage Path
storagePath.help: Directory to store checkpoint data. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/checkpoints/.

triggerOn.label: Trigger Mode
triggerOn.help: When to create checkpoints: auto (all tools except excludeTools) or manual only.

maxCheckpointsPerSession.label: Max Per Session
maxCheckpointsPerSession.help: Maximum checkpoints per session before pruning oldest.

retentionDays.label: Retention Days
retentionDays.help: Days to keep checkpoint data before auto-pruning.

restoreDefaultScope.label: Default Restore Scope
restoreDefaultScope.help: What to restore: files only, transcript only, or all.
